bigbangworld.message.no_permission: §cYou do not have permission to do this.
bigbangworld.message.cannot_create_home: §cYou cannot create homes in temporary exploration worlds.
bigbangworld.message.cannot_place_waysto: §cWaystones cannot be placed in temporary exploration worlds.
bigbangworld.message.resetting_world: §eResetting world §6{0}§e. Players will be moved to spawn.
bigbangworld.message.world_reset_failed: §cFailed to reset world §6{0}§c. Backup was preserved.
bigbangworld.message.confirm_reset:
§eYou are about to reset world §6{0}§e.
§eAll chunks, builds, entities, and structures in this world will be removed.
§eExecute §c/bbworld reset {0} --confirm §ewithin 60 seconds to confirm.
bigbangworld.message.confirm_delete:
§eYou are about to permanently delete world §6{0}§e.
§eAll files for this world will be deleted.
§eExecute §c/bbworld delete {0} --confirm §ewithin 60 seconds to confirm.
bigbangworld.message.no_exploration_worl: §cNo public exploration world configured or available.
bigbangworld.message.private_world_deny: §cThis world is private and you do not have access.
bigbangworld.message.invalid_world_id: §cInvalid world ID. Use only lowercase, numbers, _ or -.
bigbangworld.message.cannot_teleport_una: §cCannot teleport to world §6{0} §cbecause it is not active.
bigbangworld.message.spawn_set: §aSpawn for world §6{0} §aset to your current position.
bigbangworld.message.spawn_set_invalid_w: §cYou must be inside world §6{0} §cto set its spawn.
bigbangworld.message.spawn_not_safe: §cUnsafe spawn position (solid block, lava, or void detected).
bigbangworld.message.home_creation_block: §cYou cannot create homes in temporary exploration worlds.
bigbangworld.message.waystone_placement_: §cWaystones cannot be placed in temporary exploration worlds.
bigbangworld.message.claims_blocked: §cClaims cannot be created in temporary exploration worlds.
